# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
  annotations:
    description: "Namespace for microservices with Istio service mesh"

---
# Frontend Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Frontend service with Istio sidecar proxy enabled"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "500m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "256Mi"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          concurrency: 2
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8080"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "9411"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: myregistry/frontend-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "frontend-service"
            - name: BACKEND_API_URL
              value: "http://backend-api-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8081"
            - name: ORDER_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8082"

---
# Frontend Service Account
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service

---
# Frontend Kubernetes Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service
    service: frontend-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: frontend-service

---
# Backend API Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled with custom config
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Backend API service with Istio sidecar proxy enabled and custom mesh settings"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend-api-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "1000m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          concurrency: 4
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          tracing:
            sampling: 100.0
            zipkin:
              address: zipkin.istio-system:9411
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8081,9090"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "5432,6379"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundIPRanges: "10.0.0.0/8"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-api-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: backend-api
          image: myregistry/backend-api-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: grpc
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 300m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 1Gi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "backend-api-service"
            - name: DATABASE_HOST
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: backend-db-credentials
                  key: host
            - name: DATABASE_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: backend-db-credentials
                  key: password
            - name: REDIS_URL
              value: "redis://redis-cache.microservices.svc.cluster.local:6379"

---
# Backend API Service Account
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service

---
# Backend API Kubernetes Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service
    service: backend-api-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      name: grpc
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: backend-api-service

---
# Order Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Order processing service with Istio sidecar proxy enabled"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "150m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "192Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "750m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "384Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          concurrency: 2
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          terminationDrainDuration: 30s
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8082"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "5432"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: myregistry/order-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 384Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 750m
              memory: 768Mi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "order-service"
            - name: NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://notification-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8083"
            - name: BACKEND_API_URL
              value: "http://backend-api-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8081"

---
# Order Service Account
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service

---
# Order Kubernetes Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
    service: order-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: order-service

---
# Notification Service - Istio sidecar injection DISABLED (external legacy service)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio-excluded
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Notification service with Istio sidecar proxy DISABLED - legacy service not yet migrated to mesh"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: notification-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: notification-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: notification-service
          image: myregistry/notification-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 300m
              memory: 256Mi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "notification-service"
            - name: SMTP_HOST
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: notification-smtp-credentials
                  key: host
            - name: SMTP_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: notification-smtp-credentials
                  key: password

---
# Notification Service Account
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service

---
# Notification Kubernetes Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    service: notification-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: notification-service

---
# Redis Cache - Istio sidecar injection DISABLED (stateful infrastructure component)
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: redis-cache
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: redis-cache
    version: v1
    mesh: istio-excluded
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Redis cache with Istio sidecar proxy DISABLED - infrastructure component excluded from mesh"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: redis-cache
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: redis-cache
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: redis-cache-sa
      containers:
        - name: redis
          image: redis:7.2-alpine
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6379
              name: redis
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 6379
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 6379
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5

---
# Redis Service Account
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: redis-cache-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: redis-cache

---
# Redis Kubernetes Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: redis-cache
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: redis-cache
    service: redis-cache
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 6379
      targetPort: 6379
      name: redis
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: redis-cache

---
# Istio PeerAuthentication - enforce mTLS for the namespace
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-mtls
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Enforce strict mTLS for all services in the microservices namespace"
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
# Istio DestinationRule - apply mTLS traffic policy for backend-api-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service-destination
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Destination rule with mTLS and circuit breaker for backend API service"
spec:
  host: backend-api-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        http2MaxRequests: 1000
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50

---
# Istio DestinationRule - apply mTLS traffic policy for order-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: order-service-destination
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Destination rule with mTLS and circuit breaker for order service"
spec:
  host: order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 50
        http2MaxRequests: 500
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 20s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 30

---
# Istio VirtualService - routing rules for frontend-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: frontend-service-vs
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Virtual service routing with timeout and retry policies for frontend"
spec:
  hosts:
    - frontend-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  http:
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: frontend-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 8080
      timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream
